sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84662" key="polublasti/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-βλαστία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84662.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vigorous shooting,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:3:7:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
